Brooo, yea, i can call you bro, hope that in 2026 we are going to meet each other on any IRL event. Hugs and shake your hand."}

data.comment: A Gigachad present within the Abstract ecosystem

translation.translatedContent: A Gigachad present within the Abstract ecosystem
translation.translatedDescription:
Aliru is very present within the Abstract ecosystem, he is an active Gigachad, often there to help the community.

He brings his touch of freshness and originality.

I appreciate him for his authenticity.

data.metadata: {"description":"Envok knows what he's talking about, and I've often seen him discuss highly technical topics on our ecosystem for hours on end, without faltering and bringing real value to his arguments. He's a real OG of web3."}

translation.translatedDescription: Envok knows what he's talking about, and I've often seen him discuss highly technical topics on our ecosystem for hours on end, without faltering and bringing real value to his arguments. He's a real OG of web3.

data.metadata: {"description":"I've been a mutual of Pavil for years, and have thoroughly enjoyed his work proliferating penguins on the walls of the real world."}

translation.translatedDescription: I've been a mutual of Pavil for years, and have thoroughly enjoyed his work proliferating penguins on the walls of the real world.

data.metadata: {"description":"He is so supportive, can't forgot how we met each other first time on X, he supported my street art. He is OG in crypto, OG in Pudgy Penguins Ecosystem, so trusted person in web3!"}

translation.translatedDescription: He is so supportive, can't forgot how we met each other first time on X, he supported my street art. He is OG in crypto, OG in Pudgy Penguins Ecosystem, so trusted person in web3!

data.metadata: {"description":"I first knew pav as the best street artist in web3 and especially for the pudgy community, but then also had some business together and he handled everything smoothly"}

data.metadata: {"description":"Happy to support people who is always try to learning more as i wrote in review for Jan. Your content is helpful!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Happy to support people who is always try to learning more as i wrote in review for Jan. Your content is helpful!

Met Envok back in the early days of the @abstractchain Discord. He was just spreading good vibes and calling out the farmers. Later on, we both earned the GIGA Chad role and connected on a personal level.

He taught me trading skills and has been super supportive in my content creation journey.

If you want a solid perspective on the crypto market no hype, no emotions, Envok’s your guy.

data.metadata: {"description":"Merheb is a giga chad and day one bro on Abstract Chain. Extremely kind, funny and charismatic person(thats why he succeeded in streaming). He is balls deep into Abstract eco always exploring new things and actually enjoying the chain."}

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0xee15Bf34284464a7d41c6162DB0d364b3B6768CF
data.metadata:
{"description":"Marianne is an incredible human being, not only she is a good friend in the space, but also a skilled professional.

She has a masterclass when it comes to community building. By building Keewy she has demonstrated the entire space the importance of community retention through well-thought incentives, activations and content.

People in the space often forget how community is the backbone to every successful project, she has proven that. 

Besides building top tier communities, her skillset as a streamer and a content creator is top notch. Heavily respected in the space across chains, she has established herself as a rising star in Web3.

I'm grateful to have worked with her advising on projects within Abstract and will continue to do so if I have the opportunity!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Marianne is an incredible human being, not only she is a good friend in the space, but also a skilled professional.

She has a masterclass when it comes to community building. By building Keewy she has demonstrated the entire space the importance of community retention through well-thought incentives, activations and content.

People in the space often forget how community is the backbone to every successful project, she has proven that. 

Besides building top tier communities, her skillset as a streamer and a content creator is top notch. Heavily respected in the space across chains, she has established herself as a rising star in Web3.

I'm grateful to have worked with her advising on projects within Abstract and will continue to do so if I have the opportunity!

data.author: 0xE4888BF702294F01fedE3993bFeBc8f638e0c6Ef
data.subject: 0xee15Bf34284464a7d41c6162DB0d364b3B6768CF
data.comment: Abstract OG and top tier creator

translation.translatedContent: Abstract OG and top tier creator
translation.translatedDescription: I don't know how she does it all at once - but everything I see Marianne put her mind to she excels in. Lucky to have met her through Abstract and take great pleasure following her journey. She is SUCH a hard worker and someone everyone in the space should look up to.

translation.translatedDescription:
Vitlus has been supporting and growing not only Ruyui but also Abstract since the very beginning: he’s an active member of the community, always aware of what’s going on, always ready to help, always moving the conversation forward.
He makes a real contribution, shares ideas, supports people, and helps projects grow. He respects the community and keeps his word.
A true GigaChad and one of those people who make our ecosystem better every single day.

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0xee15Bf34284464a7d41c6162DB0d364b3B6768CF
data.metadata:
{"description":"Marianne is an incredible giga.
You can tell she was born for the Web3 world — she moves through it like a fish in water.
She radiates an amazing aura and influence on Abstract, and is highly respected by many actors in the ecosystem.

Her strength? Humility and approachability.
What I especially appreciate about her is that she doesn’t try to influence others just to grow her own bags. She’s here to share her passion: the projects she loves, the ones she wants to support, or those she actively participates in.

I admire the kindness and authenticity she brings to everything she does."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Marianne is an incredible giga. You can tell she was born for the Web3 world — she moves through it like a fish in water. She radiates an amazing aura and influence on Abstract, and is highly respected by many actors in the ecosystem.

Her strength? Humility and approachability. What I especially appreciate about her is that she doesn’t try to influence others just to grow her own bags. She’s here to share her passion: the projects she loves, the ones she wants to support, or those she actively participates in.

I admire the kindness and authenticity she brings to everything she does.

data.author: 0xc9F4067a38878A4CdC2cdd525F090Aa8BA0aC18a

data.metadata: {"description":"Absolutely easy to call Shiv as top tier creator. Knew him more then 2 years. First touch has been when i did street art banner for him. Top space hoster, top video content maker. Shiv is absolutely legend, happy to met him. Hope one day we are going to meet IRL on any of Pudgy events"}

translation.translatedDescription: Absolutely easy to call Shiv as top tier creator. Knew him more then 2 years. First touch has been when i did street art banner for him. Top space hoster, top video content maker. Shiv is absolutely legend, happy to met him. Hope one day we are going to meet IRL on any of Pudgy events

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0x7B2451a03702EA177DABE19469A82F074Ec90791
data.metadata: {"description":"Streamer incontournable de l’écosystème Abstract, il allie influence, dynamisme et humour avec brio. Sa bonne humeur communicative et son énergie font de chacun de ses lives un vrai moment de plaisir pour la communauté. Toujours authentique et proche de son audience, il parvient à informer tout en divertissant — une combinaison rare qui renforce chaque jour son impact et sa popularité dans l’écosystème."}

translation.translatedDescription: A key streamer in the Abstract ecosystem, he brilliantly combines influence, dynamism, and humor. His infectious good mood and energy make each of his streams a real moment of pleasure for the community. Always authentic and close to his audience, he manages to inform while entertaining—a rare combination that strengthens his impact and popularity in the ecosystem every day.

data.author: 0xeA43D9d2b85a363d8e760F936b05978B853F24c4
data.subject: 0xE6Ba05ffeB162b0B1136B9D7A9EC29468fc5BD48

translation.translatedDescription: Yes, we first met in Abstract. It's a pleasure to see how she supports the ecosystem and the people within it. She plays games, streams the process, and collects NFTs + on top of all that, she recently joined Lil Pudgy as a holder. This is what true, genuine support looks like.

data.subject: 0x617eCD09885BBe66330B1b7941463c2f98aA983b
data.metadata: {"description":"Toujours un plaisir de le lire chaque jour, j'apprecie beaucoup son travail qu'il fait avec passion et envie\nIl mérite toute la reconnaissance qu'il a.\nJ'espere qu'il continuera longtemps de nous emmerveiller"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Always a pleasure to read him every day, I greatly appreciate the work he does with passion and desire.
He deserves all the recognition he has.
I hope he continues to amaze us for a long time.

He is a hard working person, always looking for ways to contribute to the ecosystem - which he is doing through multiple projects!
